_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth for Atlanta (WC 2026 host). This is the MOAT layer: human-verified 'where do <team> fans actually watch, and does this place really show matches' — the signal Google/OSM do not structure. Maintained by hand from supporters'-club listings, venue sites, and local knowledge; expand per city. `teams` are FIFA codes from config/teams.ts. `showsMatches` is a confidence 0..1. `officialFanZone` promotes the venue kind to fan_zone. Each entry carries a `note` documenting the basis so claims stay auditable.

venues.name: Brewhouse Café
venues.note: Little Five Points institution and long-established English-football supporters' bar (Liverpool FC home pub). Opens early for kickoffs.

venues.name: Fadó Irish Pub
venues.note: Buckhead Irish pub; multi-screen soccer destination that opens for international fixtures. Neutral ground — shows all nations.

venues.name: The Famous Pub & Sports Palace
venues.note: Toco Hills sports pub and a recognized English-football supporters' venue in Atlanta.

venues.name: Meehan's Public House
venues.note: Downtown Irish public house; reliably shows international matches. Neutral soccer venue.

venues.name: Hudson Grille
venues.note: Midtown sports bar with wall-to-wall screens; a default USMNT watch spot during tournaments.

venues.name: Park Tavern
venues.note: Piedmont Park venue that hosts large outdoor watch parties / fan-zone events for major tournaments.

venues.name: Taqueria del Sol
venues.note: Westside Mexican spot in a strong Mexican-American community corridor; plausible El Tri gathering point. UNVERIFIED — confirm with venue before launch.
